verdict.answer_first: A: sentence 1 says "Server-side rendered — or more precisely, prerendered/static — not client-side," which is the clearest immediate answer.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder with "For a content-heavy marketing site this isn't close" and "Pure client-side rendering... the opposite of a marketing site."
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now: choose SSG/prerendering, use runtime SSR only for per-request needs, hydrate interactive bits.
